audit_items.proof_trace: performUpkeep re-validates all critical eligibility conditions: live-auction guard (L327-329), asset-params presence (L334-336), and fresh price fetch with staleness enforcement (L315, L342). For ended auctions, the sole check is that auctionStart != 0, which is sufficient under normal Chainlink Automation operation (fresh performData per cycle). The only gap—no on-chain nonce binding performData to a specific checkUpkeep snapshot—is confined to the trusted AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE and does not create a permissionless exploit path.
